login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Use the email and password from your enrollment.

errors.generic: An error occurred. Please try again.

story.title: Our story
story.body1: Born in 2005 in Riacho He Hé (Formosa), we built a warm, rigorous learning space for every age.
story.body2: We focus on dynamic, playful classes grounded in real-life situations so you use the language with confidence.

offer.title: Who we teach & how
offer.onlineLead: 100% live sessions, twice a week (60 minutes).
offer.onlineB1: Save travel time and keep a steady rhythm with constant teacher support.
offer.onlineB2: Small groups, conversation practice, and materials aligned to international standards.

levels.title: Study levels
levels.intro: Progression follows the Common European Framework of Reference (CEFR): clear goals from your first words to professional fluency.

certs.title: Credentials & pathways
certs.edu: Registered with the Ministry of Education of Formosa (Res. 1297/05).
certs.utn: Agreement with UTN — National Higher Institute of Technical Teacher Training.
certs.cambridge: Preparation for Cambridge exams (e.g. B2 First Certificate).

import.title: Import students (CSV)
import.hint: Columns supported (Spanish or English headers): nombre/first_name, apellido/last_name, dni or documento, teléfono/phone, email, fecha_nacimiento/birth_date (YYYY-MM-DD), nivel/level (A1–C2), academic_year (default 2026). Temporary password defaults to the student’s DNI (padded to 6 characters if needed).
import.noRows: No valid rows found. Check headers and required fields.
